reclassified_2026_07_21: Downgraded from FROZEN_STRONGEST_STRUCTURED_COMPARATOR after the Codex reconciliation review. This is a real improvement over the noise-dominated legacy MC-MPC (the p16-vs-p64 0/12 vs 12/12 stability certificate stands), but it is NOT the strongest structured comparator and does NOT close the deployable residual. Four known limitations (Codex, verified): (1) integrates the 6 latent states exactly but only Monte-Carlo-approximates future demand with 8 realizations/state; (2) CRN keyed by observation_sha256 is policy-dependent, so it does NOT guarantee common shocks across divergent arms; (3) the fail-closed fallback maximizes worst-fill but can still return an infeasible action -- it flags fallback_used/planning_feasible=0 but is not a guaranteed-safe policy; (4) optimizes ret_visible, not the full-cohort endpoint that motivated the repair. The defensible universal comparator is Codex's calibrated ret_proxy_scenario_h4_p16_stratified (deeper H4, full-cohort primary) frozen in q_r1_successor_replication_v1; this prototype is retained only as an exact-state-integration cross-check tool.
purpose: Exploratory exact-state-integration belief-MPC prototype (Q-R1 Gate 1). Demonstrated that the legacy MC-MPC comparator was noise-dominated; NOT authoritative as the strongest comparator.

frozen_config.crn: keyed by (observation_sha256, state_index, realization) only; particle/arm/config independent

four_fixes_vs_legacy.exact_integration: ExactJointBelief.enumerate_states replaces sample_states (MC with replacement); the 6-state (theta,regime) mixture is integrated with exact posterior weights
four_fixes_vs_legacy.fail_closed: worst-product floor + no-lost always enforced; empty feasible set returns the max-weighted-worst-fill safe default, never the best infeasible ReT
four_fixes_vs_legacy.objective_alignment: primary objective is the same ret_visible rollout the gate scores (ret_full is degenerate in the fast-path transducer), with worst-product enforced as a hard constraint
four_fixes_vs_legacy.frozen_crn: byte-identical demand realizations across MPC* and every learner arm

action_stability_certificate.interpretation: the legacy Monte-Carlo MPC is noise-dominated (p16 disagrees with p64 in all 12 campaigns); exact integration is the stable target p64 was approximating; r16 and h4 do not change the action, so h3/r8 is the converged, efficient freeze

reconciliation.supersedes_comparator: the legacy scenario_h3_p4 / p32 belief-MPC used in the Q-R1 D3 residual, which the audit and this calibration show is noise-dominated
reconciliation.downstream_use: Gate 2 recomputes the clean deployable residual against THIS frozen MPC*; a learner is authorized only if LCB95(residual over MPC*) >= 0.015
